title: Fallout: Pipboy
description: Taking the Pipboy from fallout and bringing it to minecraft
body:
We've got the Pipboy we all love from Fallout and we've added it to minecraft.

For now it only has storage, it has 77 slots with 64 stacking.

 

Make sure you have the Pipboy in your left hand otherwise it will not render properly.

Hope you enjoy!


It is planned to do all the versions that the Fallout Inspired Power Armor mod is on that are being updated.
Those are: 1.16.5, 1.17.1, 1.18.2 and 1.19.2
